diagnosticConclusion: CSP remains temporally suspect because the reconnect appeared after M637, but the active host/port shown by M637A is 127.0.0.1:8787 and the M637 CSP allows ws://127.0.0.1:*. DevTools Console is required to distinguish CSP blocking from bridge WebSocket close/error, token/auth rejection, stale session state, or endpoint mismatch.
